title: Cobblemon plus
description: A cobblemon modpack that's catered towards multiplayer & Lan by adding brand new optimization and gameplay features. Some of these include mods that add to the experience of cobblemon, while others add on to the base minecraft side of the game.
body:
This mod was made to have a better experiance in cobblemon by adding mods to both the pokemon, and the vanilla side of minecraft. This modpack includes: 
- Backpacks
- Gravestones when you die
- Iron chests
- Grappling hooks
- Furniture
- Mega evolutions for pokemon
- capture xp for pokemon
- shiny particles for shiny pokemon
- A move inspestor for when your pokemon is in battle
- A pokedex
- Legendary pokemon structures
- chat heads,sounds, & animations
- 3 block tall doors (aswell as being able to open both doors at once)
- A usable flething table
- dual riding on horses
- linking minecarts together
- status effect bars
- Better player animations
- AND SO MUCH MORE
  
This modpack was simply made so that me and my brother could have fun with minecraft. I don't know what else to say so here's the QnA

# QnA
> Q: Does cobblmon plus support multiplayer & Lan play?
> 
> A: Yes it does! it was actuallt made with Lan play in mind. (not saying you can't play alone though).


> Q: why are there so many releases?
> 
> A: This is my first time making a modpack, so my downloads are kinda messy, I usually try to uploud versions of the modpack that are stable.

> Q: My player animations are just the default ones!
> 
> A: Try to activate it in the resources packs menu.
